# Savelle McThias — UX/UI Designer

> Savelle McThias is a UX/UI designer and Digital Experience Leader with two decades of
> experience, based in Scottsdale, Arizona. Specializing in enterprise SaaS, e-commerce,
> conversion optimization, design systems, and AI-enhanced design workflows. Available
> for project work, monthly retainers, fractional design leadership, and remote engagements.

## Services & Offers

- [UX Audit (48-hour, fixed price)](https://savellem.com/ux-audit): A productized UX audit delivered in 48 hours — recorded walkthrough video, prioritized issues list, quick-win recommendations, and a 60-minute strategy call. Best entry point for new clients.
- [Services](https://savellem.com/services): UX/UI design & research, design systems, e-commerce & conversion optimization, enterprise SaaS design, strategic/fractional design leadership, and web design/development.
- [Free UX Health Check](https://savellem.com/ux-health-check): A short interactive self-assessment that scores a product's UX across onboarding, conversion, mobile, accessibility, and design-system maturity, then returns prioritized recommendations.

## Work & Background

- [Case Studies](https://savellem.com/work): Selected UX/UI projects with objectives, role, scope, and outcomes.
- [Green Compass — Digital Experience Leadership](https://savellem.com/case-studies/green-compass-digital-experience): Full-funnel digital experience leadership in the regulated CBD wellness industry.
- [About](https://savellem.com/about): Background, professional experience, and the brands worked with (PetSmart, Plexus Worldwide, Green Compass, and others).
- [Insights](https://savellem.com/insights): Articles on UX clarity, conversion, onboarding, mobile UX, accessibility, and design systems — why products lose customers to confusion and how to fix it.

## Contact

- [Contact](https://savellem.com/contact): Email savellem@gmail.com, phone 602-931-1474, LinkedIn linkedin.com/in/savelle. Based in Scottsdale, AZ; available remotely.
